message:
chore: audit batch 493 — deadlock_test.rs, consumer.rs diff audit

New file: channel/deadlock_test.rs (36L) SOUND — regression test for
nested-sender deadlock during receiver drop.

Diff: messaging/consumer.rs SOUND — ack_floor zero-start fix, decision_log
capacity cap (4096 entries), revocation ticket TTL pruning.
